name: Arkose Energy Corp.
summary: Arkose Energy Corp. specializes in the production of oil and gas. It engages in the acquisition and development of oil and gas properties, primarily in Louisiana, New Mexico, Oklahoma, Texas, and Wyoming. Arkose Energy Corp. was formerly known as CanTex Energy Corporation and changed its name to Arkose Energy Corp. in June 2014. The company was incorporated in 2002 and is headquartered in Dallas, Texas.
